title: Starter Pack
description: A basic starter pack containing a simple world for new players.

title: Customizable world
description: Look in %DirToJar%/configs/hi/playerpos/ to see a java file open it and you can customize only your pos and inventory

title: City Props
description: Street lights, benches, signs, and other city decorations.

title: Vehicle Pack
description: Cars, trucks, and bikes to place in your world.

title: Nature Expansion
description: Trees, rocks, plants, and natural decorations.
